title: Daniel Frohman
content:
I love to picture Daniel Frohman
    In costume of a noble Roman.
    For Dan has just the style of hair,
    That Julius C�sar used to wear.
meaning:
Oliver Herford's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Daniel Frohman"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
